mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user`
status = #{status}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CAST(employee_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (employee_id, name, email, password, role, status) VALUES (#{employeeId}, #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT employee_id AS employeeId, name, email, password, role, status FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT employee_id AS employeeId, name, email, password, role, status FROM user WHERE status != 'Deleted' ORDER BY employee_id DESC
SELECT employee_id AS employeeId, name, email, password, role, status FROM user WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
